scripts.voice:run: CC_MICROPHONE_COMMAND_JSON='["../../node_modules/.bin/tsx","headless/adapters/whisper-stream-adapter.ts"]' CC_WHISPER_CAPTURE_NAME="${CC_WHISPER_CAPTURE_NAME:-Logitech Webcam C925e|Audio Streaming}" CC_AUTO_START_LESSON=0 tsx headless/cli.ts run
scripts.camera:test: CC_CAMERA_COMMAND_JSON='["../../.classroom-compass/bin/cc-macos-hand-raise","IC840 1080P HD"]' CC_AUDIO_OUTPUT=system CC_TUTOR_PROVIDER=none tsx headless/cli.ts run
scripts.room:run: CC_CAMERA_COMMAND_JSON='["../../.classroom-compass/vision-venv/bin/python","headless/adapters/rtmpose-camera-adapter.py","--camera","1"]' CC_MICROPHONE_COMMAND_JSON='["../../node_modules/.bin/tsx","headless/adapters/whisper-stream-adapter.ts"]' CC_WHISPER_CAPTURE_NAME="${CC_WHISPER_CAPTURE_NAME:-Logitech Webcam C925e|Audio Streaming}" CC_WHISPER_LANGUAGE="${CC_WHISPER_LANGUAGE:-auto}" CC_WHISPER_STEP_MS=2000 CC_WHISPER_WINDOW_MS=6000 CC_WHISPER_UTTERANCE_GAP_MS=2400 CC_REQUIRE_HAND_RAISE=1 CC_AUTO_START_LESSON="${CC_AUTO_START_LESSON:-1}" CC_STOP_ON_SENSOR_FAILURE=1 CC_AUDIO_OUTPUT=system node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env --import tsx headless/cli.ts run
scripts.camera:preview: CC_CAMERA_COMMAND_JSON='["../../.classroom-compass/vision-venv/bin/python","headless/adapters/rtmpose-camera-adapter.py","--camera","1","--preview"]' CC_AUDIO_OUTPUT=system CC_TUTOR_PROVIDER=none CC_STOP_WHEN_SENSORS_COMPLETE=1 tsx headless/cli.ts run
scripts.room:preview: CC_CAMERA_COMMAND_JSON='["../../.classroom-compass/vision-venv/bin/python","headless/adapters/rtmpose-camera-adapter.py","--camera","1","--preview"]' CC_MICROPHONE_COMMAND_JSON='["../../node_modules/.bin/tsx","headless/adapters/whisper-stream-adapter.ts"]' CC_WHISPER_CAPTURE_NAME="${CC_WHISPER_CAPTURE_NAME:-Logitech Webcam C925e|Audio Streaming}" CC_WHISPER_LANGUAGE="${CC_WHISPER_LANGUAGE:-auto}" CC_WHISPER_STEP_MS=2000 CC_WHISPER_WINDOW_MS=6000 CC_WHISPER_UTTERANCE_GAP_MS=2400 CC_REQUIRE_HAND_RAISE=1 CC_AUTO_START_LESSON="${CC_AUTO_START_LESSON:-1}" CC_STOP_ON_SENSOR_FAILURE=1 CC_AUDIO_OUTPUT=system node --env-file-if-exists=../../.env --import tsx headless/cli.ts run
